message:
feat: add --websocket flag for environments where pipe fails

- Add WebSocket-only mode (--websocket flag)
- initFromPort() uses only WebSocket transport, no pipe
- Useful for SSH/remote environments where pipe FDs don't work
- Note: Screencast not yet implemented in WebSocket mode
- Bump version to 0.8.9

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "termweb",
-  "version": "0.8.8",
+  "version": "0.8.9",
   "description": "Web browser in your terminal using Kitty graphics protocol. SDK for building terminal apps with web technologies.",
   "main": "./lib/index.js",
   "bin": {
